title: Marlow's Mod Folder
description: The Marlow Modpack includes numerous useful mods for player-versus-player combat and FPS optimization. This modpack was recreated using information obtained from Marlow’s forensic screen share.
body: The Marlow Modpack is a curated collection of mods focused on enhancing player-versus-player combat and improving FPS and overall performance. It is designed for competitive gameplay and smoother client responsiveness. The modpack was recreated based on information obtained from Marlow’s forensic screen share and aims to replicate and be an exact copy of her optimized PvP Mod Folder.
